author: Tero Karras
message: Fix a DDP consistency issue with PyTorch 2.1.
patch:
commit 008a4e5316c8e3bfe61a62f874bddba254295afb
Author: Tero Karras <tkarras@nvidia.com>
Date:   Sat Mar 16 08:49:06 2024 +0200

    Fix a DDP consistency issue with PyTorch 2.1.
---
 training/training_loop.py | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/training/training_loop.py b/training/training_loop.py
index 109d7d2..7f939a6 100644
--- a/training/training_loop.py
+++ b/training/training_loop.py
@@ -86,7 +86,7 @@ def training_loop(
     loss_fn = dnnlib.util.construct_class_by_name(**loss_kwargs) # training.loss.(VP|VE|EDM)Loss
     optimizer = dnnlib.util.construct_class_by_name(params=net.parameters(), **optimizer_kwargs) # subclass of torch.optim.Optimizer
     augment_pipe = dnnlib.util.construct_class_by_name(**augment_kwargs) if augment_kwargs is not None else None # training.augment.AugmentPipe
-    ddp = torch.nn.parallel.DistributedDataParallel(net, device_ids=[device], broadcast_buffers=False)
+    ddp = torch.nn.parallel.DistributedDataParallel(net, device_ids=[device])
     ema = copy.deepcopy(net).eval().requires_grad_(False)
 
     # Resume training from previous snapshot.

author: Tero Karras
patch:
commit 62072d2612c7da05165d6233d13d17d71f213fee
Author: Tero Karras <tkarras@nvidia.com>
Date:   Tue Jan 31 13:01:01 2023 +0200

    Fix a couple of typos.
---
 example.py  | 2 +-
 generate.py | 4 ++--
 2 files changed, 3 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/example.py b/example.py
index 89dcd6f..79e53d6 100644
--- a/example.py
+++ b/example.py
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ def generate_image_grid(
 def main():
     model_root = 'https://nvlabs-fi-cdn.nvidia.com/edm/pretrained'
     generate_image_grid(f'{model_root}/edm-cifar10-32x32-cond-vp.pkl',   'cifar10-32x32.png',  num_steps=18) # FID = 1.79, NFE = 35
-    generate_image_grid(f'{model_root}/edm-ffhq-64x64-uncond-vp.pkl',    'ffhq-64x64.png',     num_steps=40) # FID = 1.97, NFE = 79
+    generate_image_grid(f'{model_root}/edm-ffhq-64x64-uncond-vp.pkl',    'ffhq-64x64.png',     num_steps=40) # FID = 2.39, NFE = 79
     generate_image_grid(f'{model_root}/edm-afhqv2-64x64-uncond-vp.pkl',  'afhqv2-64x64.png',   num_steps=40) # FID = 1.96, NFE = 79
     generate_image_grid(f'{model_root}/edm-imagenet-64x64-cond-adm.pkl', 'imagenet-64x64.png', num_steps=256, S_churn=40, S_min=0.05, S_max=50, S_noise=1.003) # FID = 1.36, NFE = 511
 
diff --git a/generate.py b/generate.py
index dd62fa6..45c1241 100644
--- a/generate.py
+++ b/generate.py
@@ -85,10 +85,10 @@ def ablation_sampler(
 
     # Select default noise level range based on the specified time step discretization.
     if sigma_min is None:
-        vp_def = vp_sigma(beta_d=19.1, beta_min=0.1)(t=epsilon_s)
+        vp_def = vp_sigma(beta_d=19.9, beta_min=0.1)(t=epsilon_s)
         sigma_min = {'vp': vp_def, 've': 0.02, 'iddpm': 0.002, 'edm': 0.002}[discretization]
     if sigma_max is None:
-        vp_def = vp_sigma(beta_d=19.1, beta_min=0.1)(t=1)
+        vp_def = vp_sigma(beta_d=19.9, beta_min=0.1)(t=1)
         sigma_max = {'vp': vp_def, 've': 100, 'iddpm': 81, 'edm': 80}[discretization]
 
     # Adjust noise levels based on what's supported by the network.

author: Tero Karras
patch:
commit b2a26c921c5776cb52f7498248761d60649007a8
Author: Tero Karras <tkarras@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Nov 21 11:17:48 2022 +0200

    Fix to #2
---
 training/networks.py | 4 ++--
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/training/networks.py b/training/networks.py
index 5cfbd8b..d2326c7 100644
--- a/training/networks.py
+++ b/training/networks.py
@@ -73,8 +73,8 @@ class Conv2d(torch.nn.Module):
         f_pad = (f.shape[-1] - 1) // 2 if f is not None else 0
 
         if self.fused_resample and self.up and w is not None:
-            x = torch.nn.functional.conv_transpose2d(x, f.mul(4).tile([self.in_channels, 1, 1, 1]), groups=self.in_channels, stride=2, padding=w_pad+f_pad)
-            x = torch.nn.functional.conv2d(x, w)
+            x = torch.nn.functional.conv_transpose2d(x, f.mul(4).tile([self.in_channels, 1, 1, 1]), groups=self.in_channels, stride=2, padding=max(f_pad - w_pad, 0))
+            x = torch.nn.functional.conv2d(x, w, padding=max(w_pad - f_pad, 0))
         elif self.fused_resample and self.down and w is not None:
             x = torch.nn.functional.conv2d(x, w, padding=w_pad+f_pad)
             x = torch.nn.functional.conv2d(x, f.tile([self.out_channels, 1, 1, 1]), groups=self.out_channels, stride=2)
